id: Just the Two of Us Grover Washington Jr
folderName: Just the Two of Us Grover Washington Jr
setting: 雨上がりの帰り道で、二人が少しだけ本音を話す
lyrics:
I see the crystal raindrops fall
And the beauty of it all
Is when the sun comes shining through
To make those rainbows in my mind
When I think of you sometime
And I wanna spend some time with you

Just the two of us
We can make it if we try
Just the two of us
(Just the two of us)
Just the two of us
Building castles in the sky
Just the two of us
You and I

We look for love, no time for tears
Wasted water's all that is
And it don't make no flowers grow
Good things might come to those who wait
Not for those who wait too late
We gotta go for all we know

Just the two of us
We can make it if we try
Just the two of us
(Just the two of us)
Just the two of us
Building them castles in the sky
Just the two of us
You and I

lyricsJa.en: I see the crystal raindrops fall
lyricsJa.ja: 透き通った雨粒が落ちていくのが見える

lyricsJa.en: And the beauty of it all
lyricsJa.ja: そのすべての美しさは

lyricsJa.en: Is when the sun comes shining through
lyricsJa.ja: 太陽の光が差し込んでくる瞬間にある

lyricsJa.en: To make those rainbows in my mind
lyricsJa.ja: 僕の心の中に、あの虹を描いてくれる

lyricsJa.en: When I think of you sometime
lyricsJa.ja: ふと君のことを思うとき

lyricsJa.en: And I wanna spend some time with you
lyricsJa.ja: 君と少し時間を過ごしたくなる

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: We can make it if we try
lyricsJa.ja: やってみれば、きっとうまくいく

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: (Just the two of us)
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: Building castles in the sky
lyricsJa.ja: 空に城を築くように、夢を描きながら

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: You and I
lyricsJa.ja: 君と僕で

lyricsJa.en: We look for love, no time for tears
lyricsJa.ja: 僕たちは愛を探している、涙に使う時間なんてない

lyricsJa.en: Wasted water's all that is
lyricsJa.ja: それはただ無駄に流れた水みたいなもの

lyricsJa.en: And it don't make no flowers grow
lyricsJa.ja: それじゃ花は咲かない

lyricsJa.en: Good things might come to those who wait
lyricsJa.ja: 待つ人にはいいことが来るかもしれない

lyricsJa.en: Not for those who wait too late
lyricsJa.ja: でも、遅すぎるまで待つ人には来ない

lyricsJa.en: We gotta go for all we know
lyricsJa.ja: わかっている限り、僕たちは進むしかない

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: We can make it if we try
lyricsJa.ja: やってみれば、きっとうまくいく

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: (Just the two of us)
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: Building them castles in the sky
lyricsJa.ja: 空に城を築くように、夢を描きながら

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: You and I
lyricsJa.ja: 君と僕で

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: It feels kind of peaceful now.
sentences.displayHtml: It feels kind of peaceful now.

conversation.japanese: やっと雨が止んだね。なんだか少し落ち着く。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Moments like this make me slow down and think.
sentences.displayHtml: Moments like this make me slow down and think.

conversation.japanese: うん。こういう瞬間って、立ち止まって考えたくなる。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Honestly, when I think of you sometimes, I wonder what we could be if we stopped pretending this is nothing.
sentences.displayHtml: Honestly, when I think of you sometimes, I wonder what we could be if we stopped pretending this is nothing.

conversation.japanese: 正直、ときどき君のことを考えると、これを何でもないふりしなければ、僕たちはどうなれるんだろうって思う。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Maybe there's something here, but we keep waiting for the perfect time.
sentences.displayHtml: Maybe there's something here, but we keep waiting for the perfect time.

conversation.japanese: 私も考えるよ。たぶん何かあるのに、私たちは完璧なタイミングを待ち続けてる。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Waiting can be good, but waiting too long can make you lose what was right in front of you.
sentences.displayHtml: Waiting can be good, but waiting too long can make you lose what was right in front of you.

conversation.japanese: 待つことがいい時もあるけど、待ちすぎると目の前にあったものを失うこともある。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Then maybe there's no time for pretending we don't feel this.
sentences.displayHtml: Then maybe there's no time for pretending we don't feel this.

conversation.japanese: じゃあ、もうこの気持ちから目をそらしてる場合じゃないのかも。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Just the two of us, dinner this weekend.
sentences.displayHtml: Just the two of us, dinner this weekend.

conversation.japanese: シンプルに始めよう。今週末、二人だけでご飯。重く考えずに。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I guess I was trying to look for a sign, but maybe this is enough.
sentences.displayHtml: I guess I was trying to look for a sign, but maybe this is enough.

conversation.japanese: いいね。何かのサインを探そうとしてたけど、たぶんこれで十分なのかも。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Let's go for what we actually want.
sentences.displayHtml: Let's go for what we actually want.

conversation.japanese: じゃあ考えすぎるのはやめよう。本当に望んでるものに向かってみよう。

thumbnailSource: Grover Washington Jr. - Just the Two of Us Official Lyric Video / RHINO
